simple_types.name: NCFGR_CLK_Field
simple_types.code:
type NCFGR_CLK_Field is
   MCK_8,
   MCK_16,
   MCK_32,
   MCK_64)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: MCK_8
enumeration_literals.description: MCK divided by 16 (MCK up to 40 MHz).

enumeration_literals.name: MCK_16
enumeration_literals.description: MCK divided by 32 (MCK up to 80 MHz).

enumeration_literals.name: MCK_32
enumeration_literals.description: MCK divided by 64 (MCK up to 160 MHz).

simple_types.name: NCFGR_RBOF_Field
simple_types.code:
type NCFGR_RBOF_Field is
   OFFSET_0,
   OFFSET_1,
   OFFSET_2,
   OFFSET_3)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: OFFSET_0
enumeration_literals.description: One-byte offset from start of receive buffer.

enumeration_literals.name: OFFSET_1
enumeration_literals.description: Two-byte offset from start of receive buffer.

enumeration_literals.name: OFFSET_2
enumeration_literals.description: Three-byte offset from start of receive buffer.
